sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: InterDigital (NASDAQ:IDCC) Director Sells $413,750.00 in Stock
feed.summary: InterDigital (NASDAQ:IDCC) Director John Kritzmacher sold 1,250 shares of the company's stock for $413,750 on December 23rd, decreasing his stake by 7.32%. This comes after the wireless communications provider reported strong quarterly results, beating analyst expectations, and declared a $0.70 quarterly dividend. The stock traded down approximately 1.2% following the transaction.

feed.title: Which Reno grocery stores are open on Christmas Day, Christmas Eve?
feed.summary: This article details the Christmas Eve and Christmas Day operating hours for various grocery stores in the Reno-Sparks area for 2025. Most stores will have reduced hours on Christmas Eve and be closed on Christmas Day, with a few exceptions like specific Save Mart and Safeway locations. It also recommends checking a separate guide for restaurants open on Christmas Day if grocery shopping isn't an option.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ACTION REMINDER: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Announces that Synopsys Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP has announced that Synopsys investors who suffered losses between December 4, 2024, and September 9, 2025, have the opportunity to lead a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Synopsys and its executives made false and misleading statements regarding the financial health of its Design IP business, particularly concerning the impact of increased focus on AI customers. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm by the December 30, 2025 deadline to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $250,000 Capped Buffered Return Enhanced Notes linked to the iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF, due December 23, 2027, and fully guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes offer investors 1.50 times any appreciation of the ETF up to a maximum return of 24.80% at maturity, but investors risk losing up to 90% of their principal. The offering details, risk factors, and tax considerations are outlined in the pricing supplement.

feed.title: ICE First Look at Mortgage Performance: Seasonal and Calendar Factors Drive Rise in November Delinquencies
feed.summary: ICE's November 2025 mortgage performance report indicates a significant rise in delinquencies, reaching a four-year high. This increase is primarily attributed to seasonal and calendar factors, specifically November ending on a Sunday, which delayed payment postings. Despite the sharp rise, overall performance aligns with historical patterns for such calendar effects, but future December data will be crucial for confirming a quick recovery.

feed.title: Bristol-Myers Squibb stock holds Buy rating at Guggenheim amid oHCM competition
feed.summary: Guggenheim has reiterated a Buy rating and $62.00 price target on Bristol-Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) following the approval of a competing treatment for obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (oHCM). Despite new competition, Guggenheim believes Bristol-Myers Squibb's Camyzos maintains a strong position due to comparable treatment requirements, similar drug-drug interaction profiles, and extensive real-world evidence from two Phase 3 studies. BMY offers attractive fundamentals, including a 4.61% dividend yield sustained for 55 years, and strong stock momentum with low volatility.

feed.title: Franklin Resources (BEN) Raises Dividend Again, Expands Share Buyback Program
feed.summary: Franklin Resources (NYSE: BEN) has announced a quarterly cash dividend increase to $0.33 per share and expanded its share repurchase program by an additional 20.8 million shares. The company has a consistent history of raising dividends annually since 1981. Additionally, Franklin Resources connected its blockchain infrastructure to the Canton Network to expand the adoption of its tokenized fund offerings, positioning its "Benji" token for broader institutional use.

feed.title: T-Mobile Stock (TMUS) After Hours Today (Dec. 23, 2025): Key News, Analyst Outlook, and What to Watch Before the Dec. 24 Open
feed.summary: T-Mobile (TMUS) stock ended Tuesday higher but drifted slightly lower in after-hours trading. Key factors influencing investor sentiment include holiday switching incentives, competitive marketing disputes, corporate responsibility disclosures, and unusual options market activity. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average 12-month price target of $260.17, while investors also focus on the company's capital return program, including buybacks and dividends, and upcoming Q4 2025 earnings call and Capital Markets Day on February 11, 2026.

feed.title: The Boeing 777X’s Unique Wing Design That Sets It Apart From Others
feed.summary: The Boeing 777X is set to revolutionize long-haul air travel with its unique folding wingtips, designed to enhance efficiency during flight and ensure compatibility with existing airport infrastructure. This innovative feature allows for a larger wingspan (235 feet 5 inches) for better lift and fuel economy, which then folds to a more compact size (212 feet 9 inches) for easy taxiing and parking. Despite program delays, major airlines like Emirates remain committed to the 777X due to its promised efficiency and capacity improvements.

feed.title: Lyric Highlights AI-Native Supply Chain Planning at Gartner Summit, Showcases Coca-Cola Consolidated Savings
feed.summary: Lyric announced its participation in the Gartner Supply Chain Planning Summit, where it is promoting its AI-native planning platform. The company highlighted a case study involving Coca-Cola Consolidated, which reportedly achieved multimillion-dollar savings through the use of Lyric's technology. This industry exposure aims to position Lyric as a key AI-driven planning vendor and support potential revenue growth and competitive positioning.

feed.title: Tesla’s ‘Mad Max Mode’ Points to a Big Problem for Self-Driving Cars
feed.summary: Tesla's "Mad Max mode," which allows vehicles to ignore certain traffic laws, highlights a significant issue for self-driving cars and advanced driver-assistance systems. While companies like Tesla and Waymo argue for "assertive" driving for safety and traffic flow, this practice creates a conflict over who is responsible when laws are broken, raising questions about accountability and public safety. The article suggests that companies are programming autonomous systems to mimic human driving behaviors, for better or worse, leading to potential future options for varying levels of assertiveness in robotaxis.

feed.title: McDonald’s Stock (MCD) After Hours on Dec. 23, 2025: What to Know Before the Market Opens on Christmas Eve
feed.summary: McDonald's stock (MCD) closed lower on December 23, 2025, even as the broader market hit record highs, prompting investors to consider if this signals a cooling in consumer spending sentiment. Despite the dip, MCD outperformed some restaurant peers. Investors are now looking ahead to the next earnings report on February 4, 2026, and a holiday-shortened trading session on Christmas Eve with potential volatility due to lower liquidity and upcoming jobless claims data.

feed.title: Applied Materials Stock (AMAT) After Hours on Dec. 23, 2025: Latest Move, Today’s Forecasts, and What to Watch Before the Market Opens Wednesday
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) closed Tuesday, December 23, 2025, slightly higher in after-hours trading, hovering near a recent peak despite light holiday trading volumes. Investors are weighing the tailwinds of an AI-driven memory/packaging cycle against the headwinds of China/export-control uncertainty. Ahead of a shortened Christmas Eve session, the article outlines market forecasts, including a "Hold" from Seeking Alpha and a bearish valuation call from Trefis, alongside a consensus "Moderate Buy" with a slightly lower price target from MarketBeat.

feed.title: Boeing (BA) Stock After Hours Today (Dec. 23, 2025): Price Action, Key Headlines, and What to Watch Before Wednesday’s Open
feed.summary: Boeing (BA) stock saw modest dips in after-hours trading on December 23, 2025, following a quiet regular session. The main drivers were digestion of a new $2 billion Pentagon contract for the B-52 engine program and ongoing scrutiny of the Starliner safety culture. Investors are now focused on production execution, certification timelines for MAX aircraft, and the integration of Spirit AeroSystems as key elements influencing the stock's performance going into a holiday-shortened trading week.

feed.title: FatPipe Inc Highlights Proven Fail-Proof Autonomous Vehicle Connectivity Solutions to Avoid Waymo San Francisco Outage-like Situations
feed.summary: FatPipe Inc. is highlighting its autonomous vehicle connectivity solutions to prevent outages similar to the recent Waymo disruption in San Francisco. The company's technology uses software-defined multipath to combine multiple networks, including satellite and cellular, ensuring continuous connectivity and sub-second failover. This approach, demonstrated in Project Darwin, drastically increases connectivity availability for essential autonomous operations like ambulances in urban environments.

feed.title: Celularity Closes Financing Transactions
feed.summary: Celularity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELU) has announced the closing of financing transactions with Philip A. Barach, securing $10.00 million in gross proceeds with potential for an additional $2.0 million. This financing, comprising a senior secured term loan and secured convertible notes, aims to bolster Celularity's financial position and support its focus on leveraging its placental-derived platform for healthy aging and performance optimization. The company plans to articulate its refined corporate strategy in the new year, aligning scientific capabilities with long-term opportunities in longevity and age-related diseases.

feed.title: Tela Bio sues BD over hernia mesh monopoly claims
feed.summary: Tela Bio has filed a lawsuit against BD, alleging that the major medtech company has engaged in monopolistic practices to suppress competition in the hernia repair market. Tela Bio claims BD used conditional pricing and bundling contracts to prevent its OviTex mesh from being stocked, despite its competitive pricing compared to BD's Phasix line. BD denies the allegations, stating it operates fairly in a competitive industry.

feed.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Stock After Hours Dec. 23, 2025: Latest Price, Today’s Headlines, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Watch Before the Market Opens Dec. 24
feed.summary: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) stock remained largely unchanged in after-hours trading on December 23, 2025, following a quiet regular session despite a record-setting S&P 500. The article details CAT's after-hours price, recent product updates, and analyst forecasts, noting the impact of broader market trends versus company-specific news. Investors are advised to watch for a shortened Christmas Eve trading session, jobless claims data, and potential tariff headlines before the market opens on December 24.

feed.title: PepsiCo Stock (PEP) Drops After the Close on Dec. 23, 2025 — After-Hours Check, Elliott Turnaround Plan, and What to Watch Before the Dec. 24 Open
feed.summary: PepsiCo stock (PEP) declined by 2.29% on Tuesday, December 23, 2025, closing at $143.68, even as the broader market saw gains. The drop reflects investor uncertainty regarding PepsiCo's activist-influenced "value + productivity" reset and its 2026 outlook. Investors are closely watching for updates on the company's cost-cutting initiatives, SKU reductions, and its strategy for North America performance ahead of the holiday-shortened trading day on December 24 and the next earnings report in February 2026.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Stock After Hours (Dec. 23, 2025): GS Holds Near $902—Key News, Forecasts, and What to Watch Before the Dec. 24 Market Open
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE: GS) closed modestly higher on December 23, 2025, and held steady in after-hours trading near $901.90, ahead of a holiday-shortened trading day. Key factors to watch include thin trading liquidity, jobless claims data, Treasury yields, and Goldman's continuous expansion in areas like Japan's mid-cap deals and M&A optimism. The stock is trading near its 52-week high, with analyst targets generally below current levels, setting a high bar for its Q4 2025 earnings report expected on January 15, 2026.

feed.title: Dow Inc. (DOW) stock drops despite market gains: Important facts to note

Despite this, the stock maintained a positive year-to-date performance. This article highlights key trading metrics for Dow (DOW).

feed.title: Salesforce (CRM) Stock After Hours Today (Dec. 23, 2025): Key News, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Watch Before Tomorrow’s Open
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) ended Tuesday's session slightly down, closing at $263.43 and trading around $263.00 after-hours. Amid thinning holiday liquidity and a shortened trading session expected for Christmas Eve, investors are urged to monitor headlines, particularly around Salesforce's AI strategy and its "2026 comeback" narrative. Key updates include an equity award filing for Regrello integration and a customer adoption story with Garuda Aerospace, alongside analyst forecasts highlighting CRM as a potential comeback candidate.

feed.title: BigBear.ai’s Troubles: What’s Next?
feed.summary: BigBear.ai's stock has declined due to shifting investor expectations and market volatility, compounded by accusations of poor accounting and potential financial misreporting. The company faces scrutiny over its financials, including significant expenditures and retained losses despite recent revenue, leading to uncertainty about its future. Managing risk and strategic recalibrations will be crucial for BigBear.ai to regain investor confidence.

feed.title: Thomas Dean Fountain Sells 1,110 Shares of F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) Stock
feed.summary: F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) EVP Thomas Dean Fountain sold 1,110 shares of the company's stock on December 22nd for $257.90 per share, reducing his stake by 6.55%. This is part of a pattern of recent insider selling, coinciding with an ongoing cybersecurity incident and multiple class-action lawsuits against F5. Despite an earnings beat and positive FY2026 guidance, analysts maintain a "Hold" rating on the stock.

Despite these sales, Gevo maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with a target price of $6.42, and the stock currently trades around $2.16.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (PG) Stock After Hours Today (Dec. 23, 2025): Crest Texas Marketing Settlement, Holiday Trading Hours, and What to Watch Before Wednesday’s Open
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) stock finished Tuesday's session modestly higher and remained essentially unchanged in after-hours trading. Key new information for investors includes P&G's Crest brand agreeing to modify Texas advertising to show age-appropriate toothpaste usage, amid ongoing scrutiny of fluoride messaging for children. feed.title: Unraveling Cabaletta Bio Inc.’s Recent Market Moves

The company faces challenges in operational efficiency and R&D within a competitive biotech landscape, prompting market scrutiny and a need for strategic recalibration. Analysts emphasize thorough research, as highlighted by StocksToTrade's lead trainer Tim Bohen, before making trading decisions on potentially volatile stocks like CABA.

feed.title: Curtiss-Wright Corporation (CW) a Moderate Buy, Per Wall Street Analysts
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts have given Curtiss-Wright Corporation (CW) a "Moderate Buy" rating, with an average one-year price target indicating a 9% upside. This outlook is supported by expectations of mild inventory destocking and carryover pricing driving volume growth in 2026, leading to mid-single-digit top-line growth. Both Stifel and Morgan Stanley have adjusted their price targets, citing the company's strong pricing power and opportunities in stable to growing market segments, particularly aerospace and defense.

feed.title: BBLG Stocks on the Verge: How Will They Perform?
feed.summary: Bone Biologics Corp (BBLG) stocks have seen a 10.33% increase due to advancements in spinal therapies, despite recent financial reports indicating declines in net income and total assets. The company is at a crucial juncture, balancing promising product development with financial challenges. While market volatility exists, the company's strong balance sheet and focus on strategic adjustments offer potential for future gains, urging investors to weigh product innovation against cost pressures.

feed.title: D.A. Davidson Maintains Community West Bancshares(CWBC.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $26
feed.summary: D.A. Davidson analyst Gary Tenner has maintained a buy rating for Community West Bancshares (CWBC.US) and increased the target price from $24 to $26. According to TipRanks data, the analyst has a 79.8% success rate and an average return of 18.1% over the past year. This adjustment reflects increased confidence in the company's stock performance.

feed.title: Grid Dynamics shareholders approve equity plan amendment and board elections
feed.summary: Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. shareholders approved an amendment to the company’s 2020 Equity Incentive Plan, increasing available shares by 3,500,000 and restricting certain equity award actions without approval. They also elected three Class III directors—Eric Benhamou, Patrick Nicolet, and Weihang Wang—to serve until the 2028 annual meeting and ratified Grant Thornton LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm. Additionally, shareholders approved the compensation of named executive officers on an advisory basis.

feed.title: CCSC Technology stock falls after revenue decline and widening losses
feed.summary: CCSC Technology International Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ:CCTG) stock dropped 4.5% after reporting declining revenue and increased net losses for the first half of fiscal year 2026. The company experienced an 8.2% decrease in revenue to $8.47 million and a widened net loss of $0.97 million for the period ended September 30, 2025. These declines were mainly due to lower sales volumes, particularly in Europe and the Americas, despite growth in Asia.

feed.title: Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF to change name to Grayscale Ethereum Staking Mini ETF By Investing.com
feed.summary: Grayscale Investments Sponsors, LLC announced that its Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF (NYSE Arca:ETH) will be renamed the Grayscale Ethereum Staking Mini ETF, effective January 5, 2026. This change was disclosed in an SEC filing, indicating that the ETF's shares will continue to trade under the ticker symbol "ETH" on NYSE Arca. Existing stock certificates will remain valid and will not require exchange due to the name update.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics redeems $400 million in 5.000% senior notes due 2026
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ:STLD) has announced the redemption and repayment of all its outstanding 5.000% Senior Notes due 2026, totaling $400 million, effective Sunday. The redemption was executed at 100% of the principal amount plus accrued interest. This action follows the company's recent completion of an $800 million notes offering and full acquisition of New Process Steel, L.P.

feed.title: MGM Resorts Signs Landmark Branding Agreement with MGM China for Long-Term Growth: All You Need To Know
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has signed a long-term branding agreement with MGM China, extending the use of the "MGM" name in Macau until 2032, with potential extensions until 2045. This deal secures MGM's presence in the Asian market and adjusts the licensing fee structure to 3.5% of MGM China's adjusted consolidated net revenues, reflecting the increased profitability and market share. The agreement aims to capitalize on MGM China's success, which saw its market share double from pre-pandemic levels to 16% as of September 2025, benefiting both companies and enhancing Macau's role in global luxury tourism.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Stock (XOM) After Hours Today: Price Action, Top News, and What to Watch Before Markets Open Dec. 24, 2025
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) saw a solid gain during Tuesday's regular session and modest after-hours upside, supported by a "risk-on" market and stable crude oil prices. Investors are looking towards a shortened Christmas Eve trading session, focusing on potential oil market movements and macroeconomic data like jobless claims. The low-liquidity holiday conditions could amplify price movements, with analysts maintaining mostly "Buy" ratings and price targets around the low-$130s.

feed.title: 1 Cash-Heavy Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 That Underwhelm
feed.summary: This article identifies one "cash-heavy" stock with significant growth potential, Nubank (NU), highlighting its outstanding revenue growth and highly profitable sales. Conversely, it advises investors to be cautious about Westamerica Bancorporation (WABC) and NBT Bancorp (NBTB), citing their muted growth, declining profitability, and unexciting sales trends despite having substantial cash positions. The analysis emphasizes that a cash-heavy balance sheet doesn't always indicate a strong investment.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics redeems $400 million in 5.000% senior notes due 2026
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. announced it has redeemed and repaid all $400 million of its outstanding 5.000% Senior Notes due 2026, executed at 100% of the principal amount plus accrued interest. This move, based on a SEC filing, demonstrates the company's strong liquidity and follows recent strategic initiatives like acquiring full ownership of New Process Steel and an $800 million notes offering.

feed.title: Enbridge (ENB) Exceeds Market Returns: Some Facts to Consider
feed.summary: Enbridge (ENB) recently saw a 1.37% gain, outpacing the S&P 500, despite lagging the Oils-Energy sector over the past month. Analysts expect a 7.55% EPS increase and a 1.02% revenue rise in the upcoming earnings report. However, the company currently holds a Zacks Rank of #4 (Sell) due to a recent decrease in EPS estimates and a premium Forward P/E ratio compared to its industry average.

feed.title: JD.Com Near 11x Earnings: Why The Risk-Reward Still Skews Positive (NASDAQ:JD)
feed.summary: JD.com remains a "Buy" despite recent underperformance and technical weakness. The company's Q3 results showed strong 15% revenue growth, although margins were diluted by Food Delivery losses. With a compelling valuation, management expects high single-digit margins long-term and significant bottom-line growth through FY 2027.

feed.title: Xiao-I receives Nasdaq listing deficiency notices for bid price, MVPHS
feed.summary: Xiao-I Corporation has received two Nasdaq listing deficiency notices for failing to meet the minimum bid price of $1.00 per share and the minimum Market Value of Publicly Held Shares (MVPHS) of $15.0 million. The company's stock has plummeted 91.7% year-to-date, trading at $0.45 with a market capitalization of $6.34 million. Xiao-I has been granted 180 calendar days to regain compliance for both deficiencies.

feed.title: Xiao-I Corporation Hit with Dual Nasdaq Listing Deficiency Notices
feed.summary: Xiao-I Corporation (AIXI) received two Nasdaq deficiency notices in mid-December 2025 for failing to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price and the $15 million public float requirements. The company has been granted two separate 180-day grace periods to regain compliance, otherwise its ADSs risk delisting from the Nasdaq Global Market. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates AIXI as Neutral, citing weak financial performance and a bearish technical trend.

feed.title: BWXT reduces size of Jonesborough rezoning request
feed.summary: BWXT has reduced the amount of land it seeks to rezone for an expansion of its Jonesborough plant after significant community concerns. Neighbors, however, remain worried about the facility handling uranium near a flood plain that supplies their water. Planning commissioners are scheduled to consider the revised request on January 6th.

feed.title: DeFi Development Corp. shareholders approve equity plan amendments and board elections By Investing.com
feed.summary: DeFi Development Corp. (NASDAQ:DFDV) shareholders have approved key proposals at their 2025 Annual Meeting, including amendments to the 2023 Equity Incentive Plan and the establishment of the 2025 Employee Stock Purchase Plan. Shareholders also re-elected five directors and ratified Wolf & Company, P.C. as the independent accounting firm for 2025. Additionally, the company is increasing its authorized shares of common and preferred stock to 1,000,000,000 each.

feed.title: Netflix Stock (NFLX) After Hours: Shares Hold Near $93 on Dec. 23, 2025 as the Warner Bros. Deal Fight Intensifies — What to Know Before the Dec. 24 Market Open
feed.summary: Netflix (NFLX) stock remained stable in after-hours trading on December 23, 2025, as investors focused on the intensifying bidding war for Warner Bros. Discovery assets. The Warner Bros. board has reportedly favored Netflix's offer due to more secure financing, with the decision deadline extended to January 21, 2026. Heading into the holiday-shortened trading day of December 24, key factors to watch include ongoing deal developments, jobless claims data, and broader macroeconomic sentiment.

feed.title: Omnicom Group offers strategic insights for CES 2024
feed.summary: Omnicom Group is providing strategic insights for businesses and agencies attending CES 2024, aiming to help them navigate the vast innovations and opportunities presented at the event. They have developed CES Preview Reports to highlight key strategic trends and innovations, enabling companies to focus their efforts efficiently. This initiative helps businesses discern what truly matters for their operations amidst the expansive technology showcase.
